memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-02 — Market Open (Pre-Market + June 1 All-Routines Silent Failure)

Pre-Market June 2 silently failed. ADDITIONALLY June 1 (Monday) ALL 7 routines silently failed (0-byte heartbeat). 25th consecutive API-blocked session. Three limit bracket GTC orders attempted and blocked: MRVL 10sh $221 (score 8.67, T100 catalyst), MU 4sh $1,040 (score 8.0, ATH $1,035), AMD 10sh $500 (score 7.5, pullback). PLTR deferred to Mid-Morning (3-entry cap; also requires fresh 6-agent at $160).

**MRVL Teralynx T100 lesson (June 1):** MRVL recovered from post-earnings gap-fill ($201) and launched +9.42% on T100 announcement. Industry-first 102.4 Tbps AI switch silicon — this is a new product category for MRVL (switch silicon, not just ASIC). The gap-fill post-earnings (Technical 5/10 on May 29) was the bottom. T100 confirms MRVL is building a full AI networking stack. Lesson: strong fundamentals + product pipeline can overcome a 'sell the news' gap-fill.

**MU ATH lesson (June 1):** MU surged +7.77% on June 1 to ATH $1,035 on continuation of the UBS $1,625 PT thesis. No incremental catalyst needed — the UBS thesis was sufficient to drive the stock higher. Lesson: targets this large (UBS $1,625 = +75% upside from entry) attract continued institutional buying. Held above $988 stop level comfortably.

**PLTR surprise rally:** PLTR closed May 29 at $156.54 (vs ~$138 pre-market estimate). The stock apparently rallied strongly INTRADAY on May 29 — our Market Open price estimate of $137.93 was for 9:45 AM but the close was $156.54. This suggests our entry limit of $138.62 may have been hit early on May 29 if the order had been resting at Alpaca. June 1 close ~$160.65. Unrealized gain from $138.62 entry would be ~+$22/sh (+15.9%). LESSON: PLTR needed a fresh 6-agent at $160 before any new entry — the original $135-$138 thesis has been fully expressed.

**API block day 25:** Same root cause. Only path to execution = operator manual action at https://app.alpaca.markets. CRITICAL: all prior stale GTC limits (AMD $449, $520; PLTR $140; MU $765, $928; MRVL $202) must be CANCELLED — they are far below market and waste buying power.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **MRVL Teralynx T100 (June 1 — DOMINANT):** Industry-first 102.4 Tbps AI switch silicon. 25% lower power. 512-port scale-out. Fresh Wall Street interest. MRVL +9.42%.
- **MU ATH (June 1):** $1,035 close. UBS $1,625 PT thesis driving institutional inflows. +7.77% on the day.
- **S&P 500 record close (June 1):** ~7,580. Nasdaq leading. Tech/AI semis dominant. Risk-ON.
- **VIX 15.32 (June 2):** Declining from 15.83. Risk-on confirmed. Market absorbing Warsh hawkish stance.
- **FOMC June 16-17:** Rates hold expected. 20-30% hike odds by December. No imminent shock.
- **Iran ceasefire:** 60-day MOU now in effect (largely). Oil stable. Geopolitical risk premium reduced.
- **AMD pullback:** -3.9% from $518 ATH to $497 over June 1-2. No fundamental change — technical consolidation. Entry opportunity at $500.
- **PLTR:** Significantly higher than prior analysis ($160 vs $138 May 29 morning). Fresh 6-agent required for Mid-Morning entry.
- **API blockage (25th consecutive day):** Only fix: (a) add paper-api.alpaca.markets to sandbox egress allowlist OR (b) operator manual execution.
